title: Vitebsk Heavy Rain
lead: Vitebsk is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.00. This anomaly has a significant impact on the area.
body:
The current weather conditions in Vitebsk are characterized by heavy rain, with a high humidity level of 89% and a moderate wind speed of 10.5 km/h. 
 The Score of 10.0/10 indicates a severe weather event, with HDD at 11.5 GG and CDD at 0.0 GG. 
 The city's infrastructure and daily activities are likely to be disrupted due to the heavy rain and strong winds.
conclusion: Emergency response teams should be deployed immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
